title: TFC+ Tweaker
description: This mod adds MineTweaker3 Support to various TFC+ recipes to allow customization for players and modpackers.
body:
This mod adds MineTweaker3 Support to various TFC+ recipes to allow customization for players and modpackers.

Please see the instructions on how to use this addon.

MineTweaker3 is no longer listed on curseforge, but this addon works perfectly fine with the CraftTweaker legacy 1.7.10 version.

 

Original Mod Author: StrayWolfe

TFC+ Porters: Awsomekeldeo, FaceTorched

 

Provides support for the following:

Anvil

Barrel (Including heated and distillation)

Item Heating

Knapping

Loom

Quern

 

New TFC+ mechanics that are missing support:

 

Sewing (not likely possible)
